retired_branches.reason: Fully contained in cursor/music-understanding-taste-loop-v1 with no unique commits/files.

items.name: complete_pipeline_orchestrator
items.what_it_does: Runs existing complete render-oriented local pipeline.

items.name: local_config_files
items.what_it_does: Contains private local paths and plugin mappings.

items.name: source_understanding_contract
items.what_it_does: Defines strict confidence/evidence and policy gates for source understanding.

items.name: source_understanding_builder
items.what_it_does: Builds source understanding records and reports using local artifact evidence only.

items.name: source_to_generation_mapper
items.what_it_does: Maps understanding confidence/tags to deterministic generation controls.

items.name: taste_feedback_schema
items.what_it_does: Defines taste labels and policy-safe feedback validation.

items.name: composition_taste_ranker
items.what_it_does: Uses heuristic ranker when labels <20 and tiny local linear ranker when labels >=20.
blockers: Needs >=20 authorized labeled rows for trained model mode.

items.name: multi_candidate_midi_generation
items.what_it_does: Generates >=8 MIDI candidates, computes musicality features, and ranks via trained/heuristic ranker.

items.name: music_understanding_loop_orchestrator
items.what_it_does: Runs understanding -> generation -> review template -> learning status without requiring WAV rendering.

items.name: feedback_ingestion
items.what_it_does: Appends only authorized valid taste feedback rows and blocks unauthorized rows.

items.name: chordpotion_optional_role
items.what_it_does: Sets ChordPotion as optional fallback and disallows fake transform claims.

items.name: synplant_optional_sound_design_role
items.what_it_does: Defines Synplant as optional downstream role, not required for core loop truth.

items.name: existing_complete_song_pipeline
items.what_it_does: Legacy complete local render flow with optional ChordPotion/render attempts.
blockers: Not focused on understanding/taste learning loop.

items.name: cloud_activation_workstreams
items.path_or_branch: modal and cloud activation tasks in scripts/dev.ps1
blockers: New loop enforces no cloud calls.
